titleStmt.title: SII 33.65: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 65. (A.R. No. 15 of 1947.) Lōmaḍa, Pulivendla Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Third slab lying in the same place.
This is dated Śaka 1488, Akshaya, Vaiśākha śu. 15 corresponding to 1566 A.D. June 2, Sunday.

Records a gift of land for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Kēśava at Lōmaḍa, by Raṅganāthadēva Mahārāja, on the orders of his brother Maṇḍalēśvara Peda-Nārasiṁharājayya. These two were the sons of Aubhaḷarāja and grandsons of Peda-Aubhaḷadēva-mahārāja, of the Naṁdēla family belonging to the Ātrēya-gōtra, Āpastamba-sūtra and Yajuśākhā. The village is stated to have been granted to the chief as Amaranāyaṁkaram by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti śrījayādbhudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1488 Aguneṭi Ākṣaya saṁvatsara vayaśākha śu 15 puṁṇyakāla
maṁdu śrīmaṁdrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivadēvama
hārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuṁḍḍai prithvīsāmrājyaṁ
cēyucunuṁḍaṁgānu Ātrēyagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbasūtraṁ yajuśśākhādhyāyulaina
maṁḍalēśvaraṁgāraina naṁdēla pedaAvubhaḷadēvamahārājuluṁgāri pautṛlaina da
Avubhaḷarājuṁgāri putṛlayina pedanāraśiṁhvarājayya vāri Āna
tini Atani taṁmmaṁḍu raṁganādhadēva mahārājulugāru lōmaḍa
kēśavanātaniki sama¨rpiṁcina da¨rmaśāsanakramameṭlaṁnanu māku sadā
sivadēvamahārāyalu Amaranāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁccina lō
maḍakēśavanātaniki Akhaṁdatiruvaḷikeku cenu balapanūriceruvu
ku tū¨rpucavuḍa cenisaraṁcenu kha 12 yeḍudumucenuṁnnu dakṣaṇa
danānarumaḍaceruvu kriṁdanu naḍimikāluvaku vuttaraṁ
ku paḍumara puliviṁdala raṁganādhanimaḍiki dakṣana kha maḍi 2
duri maḍiṁni yātathātithi puṁṇyakālamaṁdu dhāravōsi
yistimi Ācaṁdrā¨rkaṁgānu naḍapagalavāraṁ yī dha¨rmānaku
yavvaru tappinānu gōbrāṁhala kāsilō vadhiṁccina
pāpānapōduru Akhaṁḍa tiruvaḷikeĀlinaṭlēvāśa yamaipōduru .
Digital edition of SII 33.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
